ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "artist_genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of genres the artist is known for */,
  "artist_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "artist_spotify_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's Spotify profile (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability rating of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy rating of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness rating of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness rating of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness rating of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence rating of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "track_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "track_lyrics_url" TEXT /* URL to the track's lyrics (if available) */,
  "track_isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "track_copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "album_label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "album_total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of album (e.g., studio, live, compilation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track the features belong to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Danceability, Energy) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature for better understanding */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the feature data (e.g., Spotify, Shazam) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist cover image */,
  "playlist_num_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "playlist_is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the playlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track in the playlist */,
  "track_added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "track_added_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., musician, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who listened to the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track that was listened to */,
  "listening_date" TEXT /* Date the track was listened to */,
  "listening_duration" INTEGER /* Duration (in milliseconds) the user listened to the track */,
  "listening_device" TEXT /* Device used to listen to the track (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id", "listening_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being reviewed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Contents of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Preferred music genre of the user */,
  "genre_preference_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the user's preference for the genre (e.g., 1 to 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre")
)
